node.text: John scored 40 points in a game last week, his highest ever.

node.text: John celebrated with his teammates at a restaurant after winning a tough game.

node.text: John's game next month is in Seattle, a city he loves for its energy, diversity, food, and fan support.

node.text: John mentioned exploring endorsements and used his contacts in the basketball industry and marketing skills to make connections.
